sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37543" key="e)comologhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξομολογ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n37543.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giving thanks, thankful,</tr_> ibid.; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρόπος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">84</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
